## Problem

What user problem would this solve?

## Proposal

Describe the change you want.

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you consider?

## Scope

Which part of the app is affected?

- Recording
- Live transcription
- Saved recordings
- Import / re-transcription
- iCloud sync
- Localization
- Live Activity / widget
- Settings
- Documentation
- Other:

## Notes

Add links, mockups, examples, or constraints if useful.
